vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-470: Rewrite route handlers to idiomatic Effect — eliminate runSync, try/catch, sync I/O

plan.title: Rewrite route handlers to idiomatic Effect — eliminate runSync, try/catch, sync I/O
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: Route handlers wrap imperative code in Effect.promise(async () => { try/catch }) and call Effect.runSync — 48 runSync calls, 376 try/catch blocks, 335 sync FS calls across 13 files (15K lines). This defeats Effect's error channels, blocks the event loop, and duplicates error-handling boilerplate.
narratives.Proposal: Create a typed httpHandler wrapper that maps TaggedErrors to HTTP status codes, then rewrite all 13 route files to compose effects idiomatically with yield*, replace sync FS with fs/promises, fix 5 service-layer issues, and add proper Effect-level tests.

items.title: Create httpHandler wrapper with typed error-to-HTTP mapping

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/http-handler.ts. Implement httpHandler<R>(effect) that uses Effect.catchTags to map each TaggedError to the correct HTTP status (IssueNotFound→404, RateLimited→429, TrackerNotConfigured→503, AgentAlreadyRunning→409, BeadsNotInitialized/PlanEmpty→422, TrackerApiError→502, WorkspaceCreateError/AgentStartError→500) with a catchAll fallback to 500. Export a RouteError union type.

subItems.title: httpHandler maps all 10 TaggedError types to correct HTTP status codes
Unknown errors produce 500 with error message in response body
Unit test covers each error type → status code mapping

items.title: Rewrite large route files: workspaces, specialists, issues, agents

narrative.Action: Rewrite workspaces.ts (3675 lines, 7 runSync, 72 sync FS, 85 try/catch), specialists.ts (2131 lines, 6 runSync, 21 sync FS, 45 try/catch), issues.ts (2031 lines, 13 runSync, 36 sync FS, 61 try/catch), and agents.ts (1661 lines, 7 runSync, 69 sync FS, 57 try/catch). For each: replace Effect.promise(async) with yield*, eliminate runSync with yield*, replace sync FS with fs/promises, wrap in httpHandler, remove unused service injections.

subItems.title: Zero Effect.runSync calls remain in these 4 files
Zero try/catch blocks remain (all error handling via Effect channels)
Zero sync FS calls (readFileSync, writeFileSync, readdirSync, statSync, existsSync) remain
All routes use httpHandler wrapper for error handling

items.title: Rewrite medium route files: misc, mission-control, settings, remote, conversations, costs

narrative.Action: Rewrite misc.ts (1691 lines), mission-control.ts (1197 lines), settings.ts (487 lines), remote.ts (455 lines), conversations.ts (393 lines), and costs.ts (412 lines). Same transformation: eliminate runSync, try/catch, sync FS; apply httpHandler wrapper.

subItems.title: Zero Effect.runSync, try/catch, or sync FS calls remain in these 6 files
All routes use httpHandler wrapper

items.title: Rewrite small route files: resources, cloister, metrics

narrative.Action: Rewrite resources.ts (312 lines, 5 runSync), cloister.ts (229 lines, 1 runSync), and metrics.ts (382 lines, 1 runSync). Same transformation pattern.

subItems.title: Zero Effect.runSync, try/catch, or sync FS calls remain in these 3 files
All routes use httpHandler wrapper

items.title: Fix 5 minor service-layer issues from PAN-449 review

narrative.Action: 1) linear-client.ts: change (err as any)?._tag === 'RateLimited' to err instanceof RateLimited. 2) github-client.ts: removeLabel and ensureLabel must use ghFetch() instead of raw fetch(). 3) issue-lifecycle.ts: non-fatal patchIssue use Effect.try().pipe(Effect.ignore) instead of try/catch. 4) workspace-service.ts: containerize must check createWorkspace result. 5) agent-spawner.ts: remove typeof normalizeAgentId === 'function' defensive guard.

subItems.title: linear-client retry predicate uses instanceof RateLimited
github-client removeLabel/ensureLabel use ghFetch() helper
issue-lifecycle non-fatal patchIssue uses Effect.try + Effect.ignore
workspace-service containerize checks createWorkspace result
agent-spawner has no typeof normalizeAgentId guard

items.title: Add proper Effect-level tests and rename mislabeled integration tests

narrative.Action: 1) Add httpHandler unit tests covering all error→status mappings. 2) Add integration tests using *Live layers with only external APIs (Linear, GitHub, filesystem) mocked — test that Effect composition actually works end-to-end. 3) Test error channel propagation through composed layers. 4) Rename current 'integration' test files to 'unit' since they use full vi.mock. 5) Verify existing tests still pass after route rewrites.

subItems.title: httpHandler wrapper has full test coverage for all 10 error types
At least one route has a test using *Live layers (not fully mocked)
Mislabeled 'integration' test files renamed to 'unit'
npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npm test all pass
